Video.summary: After Johnny (Jay Kirby) is accused of robbing a bank, he runs into the hills. When his friend Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) hears what happened, Hopalong sets out to find the real bad guys.
Video.title: Lost Canyon

Video.summary: A Mountie (Russell Hayden) tracks mine robbers in 1890s Canada.
Video.title: 'Neath Canadian Skies

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his sidekick (Russell Hayden) head for South America to deliver cattle.
Video.title: Law of the Pampas

Video.summary: A sergeant (Lin McCarthy), a colonel (Stephen Courtleigh), a thief (Berry Kroeger) and two other Rebel deserters trek toward Cuba through the Everglades.
Video.title: Yellowneck

Video.summary: A singing cowboy (Roy Rogers) helps a slain rancher's daughter (Ruth Terry) breed horses for the Army.
Video.title: Hands Across the Border

Video.summary: A rancher (John Mack Brown) makes his cousin (John Wayne) trail boss on a cattle drive headed for trouble.
Video.title: Hell Town

Video.summary: Deputies must save a scientist from kidnappers.
Video.title: Prairie Pals

Video.summary: Marshal John Carruthers helps a sheriff find out who stole the town's payroll, and together they discover the town's leader stole the money to buy up all the land.
Video.title: Blue Steel

Video.summary: After the Civil War, ranch owner Gil Hanley helps a stranger in desperate need of medical attention. Soon he is questioned by Union soldiers about the stranger, who turns out to be an ex-Confederate soldier.
Video.title: Hellgate

Video.summary: Jeb Stuart and George Custer get stationed at Fort Leavenworth in Kansas and work together to stop abolitionist John Brown.
Video.title: Santa Fe Trail

Video.summary: A cowboy (Bob Steele) clears a woman rancher (Claire Rochelle) suspected of robbery.
Video.title: Ridin' the Lone Trail

Video.summary: Buffalo hide trader Tom Doan must track down and outsmart a gang of white thieves disguised as raiding American Indians to save the woman he loves.
Video.title: Buffalo Stampede

Video.summary: Matt and Frankie investigate a woman's suspicious cattle ranch amid a crisis threatening competing ranches in Sweetwater, Wyo.
Video.title: Cattle Kate

Video.summary: Frankie befriends an outlaw after his gang robs the train.
Video.title: Sam Bass

Video.summary: While investigating a train robbery, Matt Clark learns about Johnny Ringo; Frankie gets a job doing undercover work; Matt tracks Johnny down.
Video.title: Johnny Ringo

Video.summary: Cisco is challenged by a man who seeks revenge after being jailed.
Video.title: Chain Lightning

Video.summary: Cisco and Pancho hope to imprison the leader of a rustling ring.
Video.title: Medicine Flats

Video.summary: Despite their position under cover as members of the infamous Quantrill gang, Matt and Frankie cannot stop them from carrying out a vicious massacre in Lawrence, Kan.; Matt sets out to hunt down Quantrill for what happened.
Video.title: Quantrill and His Raiders

Video.summary: After being wrongfully jailed on a murder charge, Cisco and Pancho escape to capture the real murderer.
Video.title: Oil Land

Video.summary: A con man resorts to murder in a phony land promotion scheme.
Video.title: Railroad Land Rush

Video.summary: Ben tries to help his paraplegic neighbor Tom by setting up a grain mill on his unused land; Tom's hired hand raises his suspicion about Ben's plan.
Video.title: The Mill

Video.summary: A member of a powerful gang murders a shopkeeper; the deputized Cartwrights sentence a murderer to hang at dawn when the leader of the gang kidnaps Ben and holds him hostage.
Video.title: Death at Dawn

Video.summary: A Deputy U.S. Marshal arrives to escort a man to California to testify against a gang; guest Dan Duryea.
Video.title: Badge Without Honor

Video.summary: A young bank robber gets a job on the Ponderosa to prevent the sheriff from finding the other members of his gang.
Video.title: Showdown

Video.summary: Buffalo Bill (Roy Rogers) and the cavalry protect mining surveyors from Indians in New Mexico.
Video.title: Young Buffalo Bill
